response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and tooling expertise but particularly excels in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and modern web technologies. While his C++ experience is limited and dated, his architectural and secure-development mindset could translate well to the role.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven architectures, message brokers, and distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective).
Strong track record in secure development practices, testing, and mentorship (e.g., workshops, TDD, CI/CD).
Diverse background in networking, multi-threading, and low-latency systems (e.g., Dunnhumby media, DLang).
concerns: Lacks recent and deep C++ experience; most relevant work is from 2014–2015 (National Instruments).
No explicit exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL).
Primarily focused on web/cloud technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than on-premises industrial automation.

key_factors.factor: Cloud and modern web technology alignment
